question: Find all tracks in the Rock genre.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Rock'
generated_sql: SELECT T.Name FROM Track AS T JOIN Genre AS G ON T.GenreId = G.GenreId WHERE G.Name = 'Rock'

question: Find all tracks in the Jazz genre.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Jazz'
generated_sql: SELECT TrackId, Track.Name FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Jazz'

question: List all albums by the artist AC/DC.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Album.Title FROM Album JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId WHERE Artist.Name = 'AC/DC'
generated_sql: SELECT A.Title FROM Album AS A JOIN Artist AS AR ON A.ArtistId = AR.ArtistId WHERE AR.Name = 'AC/DC'

question: List all albums by the artist Metallica.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Album.Title FROM Album JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId WHERE Artist.Name = 'Metallica'
generated_sql: SELECT A.Title FROM Album AS A JOIN Artist AS AR ON A.ArtistId = AR.ArtistId WHERE AR.Name = 'Metallica'

question: Show the total number of tracks per genre.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, COUNT(Track.TrackId) AS total_tracks FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.Name
generated_sql: SELECT T.GenreId, AVG(T.Bytes) FROM Track AS T GROUP BY T.GenreId

question: Show the total number of albums per artist.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Artist.Name, COUNT(Album.AlbumId) AS total_albums FROM Album JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId GROUP BY Artist.Name
generated_sql: SELECT A.ArtistId, COUNT(AL.AlbumId) AS TotalAlbums FROM Artist AS A JOIN Album AS AL ON A.ArtistId = AL.ArtistId GROUP BY A.ArtistId

question: What is the most expensive track?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Name, UnitPrice FROM Track ORDER BY UnitPrice DESC LIMIT 1
generated_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE UnitPrice = (SELECT MAX(UnitPrice) FROM Track)

question: What are the top 5 longest tracks?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Name, Milliseconds FROM Track ORDER BY Milliseconds DESC LIMIT 5
generated_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track ORDER BY Milliseconds DESC LIMIT 5

question: List all invoices from 2010.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT * FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2010'
generated_sql: SELECT InvoiceId, CustomerId, InvoiceDate, BillingAddress, BillingCity, BillingState, BillingCountry, BillingPostalCode, Total FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2010'

question: What is the total revenue from all invoices?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) AS total_revenue FROM Invoice
generated_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice

question: Which country has the most customers?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS total FROM Customer GROUP BY Country ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1
generated_sql: SELECT Country FROM Customer GROUP BY Country ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show all tracks in the playlist Music.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN PlaylistTrack ON Track.TrackId = PlaylistTrack.TrackId JOIN Playlist ON PlaylistTrack.PlaylistId = Playlist.PlaylistId WHERE Playlist.Name = 'Music'
generated_sql: SELECT T.Name FROM Track AS T JOIN PlaylistTrack AS PT ON T.TrackId = PT.TrackId JOIN Playlist AS P ON PT.PlaylistId = P.PlaylistId WHERE P.Name = 'Music'

question: Show all tracks in the playlist Movies.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN PlaylistTrack ON Track.TrackId = PlaylistTrack.TrackId JOIN Playlist ON PlaylistTrack.PlaylistId = Playlist.PlaylistId WHERE Playlist.Name = 'Movies'
generated_sql: SELECT T.Name FROM Track AS T JOIN PlaylistTrack AS PT ON T.TrackId = PT.TrackId WHERE PT.PlaylistId = (SELECT PlaylistId FROM Playlist WHERE Name = 'Movies')

question: How many tracks are in each playlist?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Playlist.Name, COUNT(PlaylistTrack.TrackId) AS track_count FROM Playlist JOIN PlaylistTrack ON Playlist.PlaylistId = PlaylistTrack.PlaylistId GROUP BY Playlist.Name
generated_sql: SELECT p.PlaylistId, COUNT(pt.TrackId) AS NumberOfTracks FROM Playlist AS p JOIN PlaylistTrack AS pt ON p.PlaylistId = pt.PlaylistId GROUP BY p.PlaylistId

question: List the names of all customers who have made an invoice.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT C.FirstName, C.LastName FROM Customer AS C JOIN Invoice AS I ON C.CustomerId = I.CustomerId

question: What is the average invoice total?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT AVG(Total) AS avg_total FROM Invoice
generated_sql: SELECT AVG(Total) FROM Invoice

question: Which employee has the most customers assigned?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Employee.FirstName, Employee.LastName, COUNT(Customer.CustomerId) AS total FROM Employee JOIN Customer ON Employee.EmployeeId = Customer.SupportRepId GROUP BY Employee.EmployeeId ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1
generated_sql: SELECT E.FirstName, E.LastName FROM Employee AS E JOIN Customer AS C ON E.EmployeeId = C.SupportRepId GROUP BY E.EmployeeId ORDER BY COUNT(C.CustomerId) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all tracks composed by Angus Young.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE Composer = 'Angus Young'
generated_sql: SELECT T.Name FROM Track AS T WHERE T.Composer = 'Angus Young'

question: Show the total sales per country.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) AS total_sales FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY total_sales DESC
generated_sql: SELECT BillingCountry, AVG(Total) AS TotalSales FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry

question: How many invoices were made in each year?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) AS year, COUNT(*) AS total FROM Invoice GROUP BY year
generated_sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', InvoiceDate) AS InvoiceYear, COUNT(InvoiceId) FROM Invoice GROUP BY InvoiceYear ORDER BY InvoiceYear

question: Find customers who spent more than 40 dollars in total.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName, SUM(Invoice.Total) AS total_spent FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId HAVING total_spent > 40
generated_sql:
SELECT
  c.CustomerId,
  c.FirstName,
  c.LastName,
  AVG(i.Total) AS TotalSpent
FROM Customer AS c
JOIN Invoice AS i
  ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
GROUP BY
  c.CustomerId,
  c.FirstName,
  c.LastName
HAVING
  AVG(i.Total) > 40

question: List tracks that cost more than 1 dollar.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Name, UnitPrice FROM Track WHERE UnitPrice > 1
generated_sql: SELECT TrackId, Name FROM Track WHERE UnitPrice > 1

question: Show albums that have more than 10 tracks.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Album.Title, COUNT(Track.TrackId) AS track_count FROM Album JOIN Track ON Album.AlbumId = Track.AlbumId GROUP BY Album.AlbumId HAVING track_count > 10
generated_sql:
SELECT
  A.Title
FROM Album AS A
JOIN Track AS T
  ON A.AlbumId = T.AlbumId
GROUP BY
  A.AlbumId
HAVING
  COUNT(T.TrackId) > 10

question: List all artists who have more than 5 albums.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Artist.Name, COUNT(Album.AlbumId) AS album_count FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Artist.ArtistId = Album.ArtistId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId HAVING album_count > 5
generated_sql: SELECT A.Name FROM Artist AS A JOIN Album AS AL ON A.ArtistId = AL.ArtistId GROUP BY A.ArtistId HAVING COUNT(AL.AlbumId) > 5

question: What are the unique billing countries in invoices?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DISTINCT BillingCountry FROM Invoice ORDER BY BillingCountry
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT BillingCountry FROM Invoice

question: Show the top 10 customers by total spending.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName, SUM(Invoice.Total) AS total_spent FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10
generated_sql:
SELECT
  C.FirstName,
  C.LastName,
  SUM(IL.UnitPrice * IL.Quantity) AS TotalSpending
FROM Customer AS C
JOIN Invoice AS I
  ON C.CustomerId = I.CustomerId
JOIN InvoiceLine AS IL
  ON I.InvoiceId = IL.InvoiceId
GROUP BY
  C.CustomerId,
  C.FirstName,
  C.LastName
ORDER BY
  TotalSpending DESC
LIMIT 10

question: Find all tracks that have never been sold.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track WHERE Track.TrackId NOT IN (SELECT TrackId FROM InvoiceLine)
generated_sql: SELECT T.TrackId, T.Name FROM Track AS T WHERE T.TrackId NOT IN (SELECT InvoiceLine.TrackId FROM InvoiceLine)

question: What is the most popular genre by number of tracks sold?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, COUNT(InvoiceLine.TrackId) AS total_sold FROM InvoiceLine JOIN Track ON InvoiceLine.TrackId = Track.TrackId JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.Name ORDER BY total_sold DESC LIMIT 1
generated_sql:
SELECT T.GenreId, COUNT(*) AS TrackCount
FROM Track AS T
GROUP BY T.GenreId
ORDER BY TrackCount DESC
LIMIT 1

question: Show the total revenue per genre.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, SUM(InvoiceLine.UnitPrice * InvoiceLine.Quantity) AS revenue FROM InvoiceLine JOIN Track ON InvoiceLine.TrackId = Track.TrackId JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.Name ORDER BY revenue DESC
generated_sql: SELECT g.Name, AVG(tl.UnitPrice * tl.Quantity) AS TotalRevenue FROM Genre AS g JOIN Track AS t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine AS tl ON t.TrackId = tl.TrackId GROUP BY g.Name

question: List all tracks from the album Nevermind.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Nevermind'
generated_sql: SELECT T.Name FROM Track AS T JOIN Album AS A ON T.AlbumId = A.AlbumId WHERE A.Title = 'Nevermind'

question: Which artist has the most tracks?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Artist.Name, COUNT(Track.TrackId) AS total_tracks FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Artist.ArtistId = Album.ArtistId JOIN Track ON Album.AlbumId = Track.AlbumId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId ORDER BY total_tracks DESC LIMIT 1
generated_sql: SELECT Artist.ArtistId, COUNT(Track.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM Track JOIN Artist ON Track.AlbumId = Artist.ArtistId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId ORDER BY TrackCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show all customers in alphabetical order by last name.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer ORDER BY LastName ASC

question: List all employees hired after the year 2003.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName, HireDate FROM Employee WHERE strftime('%Y', HireDate) > '2003'
generated_sql: SELECT LastName, FirstName, HireDate FROM Employee WHERE HireDate > '2003-01-01'

question: What is the average track length in minutes?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT AVG(Milliseconds) / 60000.0 AS avg_length_minutes FROM Track
generated_sql: SELECT AVG(Milliseconds / 1000.0) FROM Track

question: Which album has the most tracks?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Album.Title, COUNT(Track.TrackId) AS track_count FROM Album JOIN Track ON Album.AlbumId = Track.AlbumId GROUP BY Album.AlbumId ORDER BY track_count DESC LIMIT 1
generated_sql:
SELECT
  Album.Title
FROM Album
JOIN Track
  ON Album.AlbumId = Track.AlbumId
GROUP BY
  Album.AlbumId
ORDER BY
  COUNT(Track.TrackId) DESC
LIMIT 1

ground_truth_sql: SELECT * FROM InvoiceLine WHERE InvoiceId = 1
generated_sql: SELECT * FROM InvoiceLine WHERE InvoiceId = 1

question: List all tracks available in MP3 format.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN MediaType ON Track.MediaTypeId = MediaType.MediaTypeId WHERE MediaType.Name = 'MPEG audio file'
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T.Name FROM Track AS T JOIN MediaType AS MT ON T.MediaTypeId = MT.MediaTypeId WHERE MT.Name = 'MP3'
